sources.toml:
[deployment]
expose = true
port = 8080

[services.postgres]
enabled = true
[services.minio]
enabled = true

[deployment]
expose = false
port = 8080

[services.postgres]
enabled = true
[services.minio]
enabled = true

bitswan_yaml:
deployments:
  frontend-acme-dev:
    automation_name: frontend
    context: acme
    stage: dev
    checksum: frontsum
    relative_path: copies/main/acme/frontend
  backend-acme-dev:
    automation_name: backend
    context: acme
    stage: dev
    checksum: backsum
    relative_path: copies/main/acme/backend
